name: IT Support & Administration
student_summary: Keep an organization's computers, accounts and networks running for everyone.
overview: Keep an organization's computers, accounts and networks running for everyone. IT Support & Administration sits in the Security & Infrastructure family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You draw energy from working closely with people
who_should_avoid: You want to avoid routine tasks — parts of this role are being automated, so you must keep climbing the skill ladder
daily_responsibilities: Collaborate with your team using networking basics
Keep improving at system administration — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: moderate — routine parts will be automated; the judgement stays human
advantages: A broad Security & Infrastructure foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Routine tasks are being automated — you must keep moving up the value chain
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” IT Support & Administration is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of networking basics
projects: Beginner: explore troubleshooting with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Windows Server
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Cloud & Infrastructure: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Networking & Telecom: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Cybersecurity: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does IT Support & Administration pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹18 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Computer Science, Mathematics. Typical degrees: BCA, B.Sc IT. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?

AI impact is moderate — routine parts will be automated; the judgement stays human. Broad paths like IT Support & Administration evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
IT Support & Administration is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
